class UserRepository:
    def __init__(self, db_connection):
        self._db = db_connection

    def get_user(self, user_id: int) -> dict:
        row = self._db.query("SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = %s", (user_id,))
        return {"id": row["id"], "name": row["name"].strip()}


class PricingService:
    def __init__(self, discount_policy):
        self._discount_policy = discount_policy

    def calculate_order_total(self, order_items: list) -> float:
        subtotal = sum(item["price"] for item in order_items)
        return self._discount_policy.apply(subtotal)


class NotificationService:
    def __init__(self, channel_resolver):
        self._channel_resolver = channel_resolver

    def send_notification(self, user_id: int, message: str):
        channel = self._channel_resolver.resolve(user_id)
        channel.send(message)
